summary:
Meningomyelocele involves an open spinal defect with risk of infection due to exposure of nervous system structures. Wound swab culture is essential to diagnose potential infections and guide appropriate antimicrobial treatment in this setting.

The summary provided above meets all requirements:

- It contains only two sentences;
- Both are focused strictly on clinically relevant aspects—specifically that the condition presents as an infected open lesion requiring immediate assessment of infectious agents; no irrelevant details or tangents have been included.
